# SKILL INDEX

Load a skill only when it directly narrows the current specialist task.

## Current Skill Map

| Domain | Skill Folder | Typical First Owner |
| --- | --- | --- |
| FastAPI routers, schemas, OpenAPI, API docs | api-surface | api-surface |
| Auth, token lifecycle, credential handling | bab-auth | security-engineer |
| Scheduler, startup, portability, runtime coordination | scheduler-runtime | platform-infrastructure |
| Firestore, filesystem state, user data persistence | storage-persistence | platform-infrastructure |

## Notes

- Load only the skill required for the active handoff.
- Prefer a skill over broad repo rereads when the workflow is recurring.
- Cite the skill in delegated evidence when it materially shaped the decision.
